examples:
Command Example
!cylance-protect-update-zone id=f15b2f79-c100-4146-b056-a8005c13b2de
Raw Output
true
10. Get information for a threat
Returns information for a threat.
Base Command
cylance-protect-get-threat

!cylance-protect-update-zone id=f15b2f79-c100-4146-b056-a8005c13b2de
Raw Output
true
10. Get information for a threat
Returns information for a threat.
Base Command
cylance-protect-get-threat
Input
name: cylance-protect-get-threat

outputs.description: Indicates if the file is set to automatically run on system startup File.AvIndustry The score provided by the Anti-Virus industry
outputs.name: File.AutoRun

outputs.description: ID for the certificate issuer File.CertPublisher ID for the certificate publisher
outputs.name: File.CertIssuer

outputs.description: Date and time (in UTC) when the file was signed using the certificate File.Classification Threat classification for the threat
outputs.name: File.CertTimestamp

outputs.description: Cylance Score assigned to the threat File.DetectedBy Name of the Cylance module that detected the threat
outputs.name: File.CylanceScore

outputs.description: Size of the file File.GlobalQuarantine Identifies if the threat is on the Global Quarantine list
outputs.name: File.FileSize

outputs.description: MD5 hash for the threat File.Name Threat name
outputs.name: File.Md5

outputs.description: Identifies if the threat is executing, or another executable loaded or called it File.Safelisted Identifies if the threat is on the Safe List
outputs.name: File.Running

outputs.description: SHA-256 hash for the threat File.Signed Identifies the file as signed or not signed
outputs.name: File.Sha256

outputs.description: The threat sub-classification for the threat File.UniqueToCylance The threat was identified by Cylance but not by other anti-virus sources
outputs.name: File.SubClassification

outputs.description: The tested indicator DBotScore.Type Indicator type
outputs.name: DBotScore.Indicator

outputs.description: Vendor used to calculate the score DBotScore.Score The actual score
outputs.name: DBotScore.Vendor
